description: Inspired by the sailors, nautica Voyage for men has strong aquatic traces. Reminiscent of stylish evenings in the city, this fragrance bottled in a delectable blue flacon has top notes of lavender, juniper and pink pepper with floral and subtle woodsy tones.Quantity: 100mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
